old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-6zgj","title":"[codereview] KISS: kiss_encode uses conservative worst-case buffer check","description":"The pre-check assumes every data byte requires escaping (data_len*2 +4). This rejects buffers that would suffice for actual data (only FEND/FESC escaped). Match Rust impl by using incremental checks during encoding. Priority P2 as it limits usability of kiss_encode API for callers with tight buffers. See rust/lichen-kiss/src/framing.rs:276 and kiss_escape. Also update docstring.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","created_at":"2026-07-22T18:51:01.937817268Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T18:51:01.937817268Z","labels":["codereview"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-6zgj","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-8ysr","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-22T18:51:02.067801909Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}
